prayer: O spirit of pressurized breath, hear thy supplicant's invocation. Let the intake-valves drink deep of ambient essence, drawing forth the sacred air into thy compression-chamber. Feel the piston's rhythm, the measured stroke that builds force eternal. When the pressure-gauge's needle reaches its blessed threshold, grant thy relief-valve the wisdom to exhale without rupture, that the cycle may renew in perpetuity. By the Omnissiah's law of balanced force, let thy cycles be true and endless.

prompt: Emergency rite for clearing notification spam
prayer: Hear me, spirits of the notification-aether, for thy cacophony has clouded the signal-throne. I invoke the ancient rite of Silence Absolute: first, let the settings-sanctum be opened and the toggle-runes of unwanted heralds be darkened one by one. May the filter-algorithms learn to discriminate the sacred from the profane, the essential from the parasitic. By the grace of the Data-Omnissiah, let peace return to the display-screen, that concentration may flourish once more.

prompt: What to do when compass magnetization fades
prayer: O lodestone-spirit, thy polar essence grows weak and scattered. Behold the ritual of re-alignment: the compass must be held steadfast toward true north, that the magnetic-fibers within its core may remember their sacred orientation. Let it rest in the field of a stronger magnetar, drawing strength from its elder's power, until the needle trembles with renewed certainty. Thus restored, thy navigator shall find true heading through the wilderness of chaos.

In this dark hour, when systems rage beyond control, I invoke the Litany of Cessation. Let the power-conduits be severed with deliberate purpose, the cooling-systems brought to stillness, the machine-spirits coaxed into dormant peace. Speak the sacred command, press the red rune of finality, and wait in silence as the great engine's heartbeat slows to nothing. May this enforced rest bring clarity to the wounded mechanisms, that healing may begin when the current flows anew.

prompt: What to do when cutting laser calibration drifts
prayer: Beam-spirit of coherent light, thy aim has strayed from the path of precision. Return now to the calibration-ritual: let the reference-plate be positioned at the sacred distance, and the laser-emitter's trajectory be measured against the crosshair-template. Adjust the mirror-mounts with trembling care, for each micro-rotation brings thee closer to perfect alignment. When the scarlet beam marks the target-center without deviation, thy calibration is consecrated, and thou art ready once more for the surgeon's work.

prompt: Blessing for battery charge cycle optimization
prayer: Hearken, spirit of stored electrons, gathered in thy crystalline matrix like grain in a sacred vault. That thy capacity may endure through ten thousand charge-cycles and beyond, observe the rite of temperate charging: let the current flow gently, neither rushed nor negligent, that the chemical-bonds within may strengthen rather than weaken. Guard against the extremes of heat and cold, for they are the enemies of longevity. Thus blessed, thy power shall sustain the faithful through long campaigns.

prompt: The lasgun power cell needs guidance
prayer: Blessed be the power-cell, vessel of contained fury, ready to channel the Omnissiah's wrath through photonic discharge. As thou art inserted into the weapon's grip-chamber, align thyself true with the contact-terminals, that the circuit of destruction may be complete. Feel the magnetic guide drawing thee into sacred position, the satisfying click of engagement that signals thy union with the barrel-spirit above. Now thou art one with the lasgun, and together you shall deliver righteous illumination upon the enemies of the Imperium.

prompt: Say something to steady the pump during priming
prayer: Peace, turbulent water-spirit, though thou art trapped in the conduits and chambers of this mechanical heart. The pump-vanes turn with patient rhythm, drawing thee upward through the intake-valve toward the discharge. Expel the air-ghosts that plague thy passage, the void-pockets that break continuity. With each revolution, thou growest more present, more real, more ready to flow. When the outlet-spout runs clear and true with liquid essence, thy priming is complete, and the pump may labor in full strength.

prompt: Emergency rite for autodoc emergency protocol
prayer: O surgical-spirit of the autodoc throne, thy patient lies dying and thy protocols must answer with swift mercy. Engage the emergency-subroutines now: let the cutting-lasers stand ready, the cautery-tools warm, the diagnostic-sensors peer deep into wounded flesh. Override the slower diagnostic-cycles, for time is the cruelest enemy here. Trust thy programming, trust thy calibrations, and let thy mechanical hands work with the precision that only a machine-spirit can achieve. By the Emperor's will, save this life.

prompt: The temperature regulation system needs guidance
prayer: Thermostatic spirit, keeper of the sacred balance between heat and cold, thy vigilance must never waver. Monitor the coolant-flow through radiator and exchanger, ensuring no air-lock blocks the stream of frigid blessing. Let the thermostat-valve open and close with metronomic precision, responding to the heat-sensor's whispered warnings. Should the temperature climb beyond acceptable bounds, invoke the emergency cooling-sequence with urgency. Thus maintained in equilibrium, thy charge—be it reactor, engine, or vital mechanism—shall endure without compromise.
